text: Recommendation Review Article Definition of the halogen bond (IUPAC recommendation) DOI: 10.1039/C5SC00013F A definition of the term halogen bond is provided. The halogen bond is one type of noncovalent interaction defined as a net attractive force between an electrophilic site on a halogen atom and a nucleophilic site on another atom, group or molecule. In accordance with current IUPAC nomenclature a description of a halogen atom participating in a hydrogen bond is distinguished from a description of a halogen bond. In addition to the definition of the term halogen bond the structural, energetic and spectroscopic evidence for the occurrence of a halogen bond is summarized.
